//: Playable races. attributeBonuses/skillBonuses are added on top of the points the player distributes. 'abilities' (optional) grants racial abilities from abilities.json. Dialogue can react to race via the {"type":"race"} condition.

races.name: Cragfolk
races.desc: Quarry-bred highlanders who speak sparingly and stand like their stone. The Hush frightens them less than most — they were half in love with quiet already.

races.name: Skyborn
races.desc: Heirs of the old wind-reading orders, raised on rooftop observatories. They can tell tomorrow's weather from a candle flame — and they keep meticulous notes on the Hush.

races.name: Hollowed
races.desc: Folk the Hush touched and, inexplicably, released. Their voices carry a strange flat calm and the silence parts around them like water. Others find them unsettling; the Hush finds them familiar.
